backward_compatibility.rationale: User-approved replacement-first policy: if KA Train has 1:1 functionality, replace directly; no compatibility layer required.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: When functionality is replaced by KA Train-derived implementation, old code should be removed. Preserve functional deltas by carrying them into the replacement design.

option_selection.rationale: Governance selected OPT-1 (Targeted Algorithm Port) with conditions to enforce frame parity test gate, MIT attribution, and explicit exclusion of Kivy-coupled engine/rules migration.

superseded_reason: Target module analyzers/tsumego_frame.py was replaced by analyzers/tsumego_frame_gp.py (GP frame swap, 2026-03-13). All 87 BFS frame tests are now skipped. KA Train frame algorithm port is no longer applicable to the active code path.
